Short CV

Instructor Naz Esin President ÖZDEMİR was born in 1993 and graduated from Cumhuriyet University, Department of Opticianry in 2013. She graduated from Atatürk University, Department of Health Management in 2017, ÖZDEMİR completed her master's degree in Health Management at Nişantaşı University in 2021.
